title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Percale Pillow Case, Polycotton, White, Queen
features: Percale: A higher quality fabric containing a high density of fine count yarn. This gives a softer, smoother feel. Non-Iron: An excellent characteristic, to save precious moments of your busy life.
Durability: Capable of withstanding wear and tear or decay; a durable fabric. Able to perform or compete over a long period, as by avoiding or overcoming damages.
Softness: Fabric retains it's natural softness to give you an extra luxury. Draws moisture away from skin to help balance body temperature.
Machine Washable. Washable at 40 °C. Do not Dry clean. Do not bleach. Tumble dry at low temperature.
Iron at low temperature. Maximum sole-plate temperature is 110 °C. Steam ironing may be a risk.
